info.name: Microservices - Auth + User + Follow + Book + BookV2 + Social + RAG
info.description:
Auth (:8001) · User (:8002) · Follow (:8003) · Book (:8004) · BookV2 (:8007) · Social (:8005) · RAG (:8006)

Flow:
1. Register Alice & Bob (Auth)
2. Login Alice (Auth) - tokens saved automatically
3. Follow Bob (Follow)
4. Add publisher/author/book (Book /internal/* - requires Bearer)
5. Import books/authors from APIs (BookV2)
6. Like + rate + review + shelf (Social)
7. Get recommendations (RAG)

exec: // Collection Pre-request Script – runs before EVERY request.
// Skips public endpoints. Attaches Bearer token automatically.
// Auto-refreshes via Auth service /refresh when token is missing.
console.log('❌ No tokens – run Login first!');
console.log('🔄 No access_token – auto-refreshing via Auth service…');
body: { mode: 'raw', raw: JSON.stringify({ refresh_token: refreshToken }) }
console.log('❌ Refresh failed – run Login again.', err || res.json());
console.log('✅ Logged in as Alice – tokens saved');
if (pm.response.code === 200) console.log('✅ Token valid for:', pm.response.json().username);
console.log('✅ Profile:', j.username, '| id:', j.id, '| bio:', j.bio);
console.log('✅ Tokens rotated via User→Auth gRPC');
console.log('✅ Follow stats – followers:', j.followers_count, '| following:', j.following_count);
console.log('✅ Now following user', j.followee_id, '| follower_id:', j.follower_id);
console.log('✅ Followers total:', j.total, '| items:', j.items.length);
console.log('✅ Following total:', j.total, '| items:', j.items.length);
console.log('✅ Stats – followers:', j.followers_count, '| following:', j.following_count);
console.log('✅ Author:', j.name, '| books:', j.books.length, '| awards:', j.awards.length);
if (pm.response.code === 200) console.log('✅ Shelf items total:', pm.response.json().total);
if (pm.response.code === 200) console.log('✅ Shelf books total:', pm.response.json().total);

item.name: Resolve Book + Writer (DB first, Wiki fallback)

exec: console.log('✅ new book:', j.book_was_new, '| new writer:', j.writer_was_new, '| top5_added:', j.top5_added);
if (pm.response.code === 200) console.log('✅ BookV2 search total:', pm.response.json().total);
if (pm.response.code === 200) console.log('✅ BookV2 writer search total:', pm.response.json().total);
if (pm.response.code === 200) console.log('✅ BookV2 total authors:', pm.response.json().total);
if (pm.response.code === 200) console.log('✅ BookV2 author search total:', pm.response.json().total);
if (pm.response.code === 200) console.log('✅ GET book recommend source:', pm.response.json().source);
if (pm.response.code === 200) console.log('✅ GET writer recommend source:', pm.response.json().source);
